channel.title: Ntp on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Ntp on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Chrony vs NTPsec vs OpenNTPD: Self-Hosted Time Synchronization Guide 2026
item.description: Time synchronization is one of those invisible infrastructure pillars that nobody thinks about — until certificates expire early, distributed databases diverge, or backup timestamps go haywire. A reliable Network Time Protocol (NTP) server is essential for everything from TLS certificate validation to log correlation and filesystem consistency.
